# Upstream DVC snapshot

- Source: https://github.com/hancom-io/dvc
- Fetched: shallow clone (depth=1) at repository initialization.
- Purpose: Reference-only. Used to cross-check rule schema, JID error codes,
  output JSON field layout, and CLI flag semantics during the Rust port.
- License: Apache-2.0 (see `LICENSE` and `NOTICE.txt` in this directory).
- Not built or distributed as part of polaris_rhwpdvc.
